title: thelypteris lanipes
intro: Thelypteris lanipes, also known as the southern lady fern, is a species of fern found in Southeast Asia, particularly in China, Taiwan, and parts of Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris lanipes include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve immune function. Thelypteris lanipes can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of a poultice or salve.
